title: Wynncraft Enhanced
description:
Wynntils + Client Optimizations in Minecraft 1.21. Specifically crafted for the Wynncraft MMORPG.

https://wynncraft.com/
body:
# Wynncraft Enhanced

Provides an enhanced experience for Wynncraft with client-side optimizations and the renowned Wynntils Artemis as the core functions of this Modpack.

This pack focuses on the latest version of Wynntils, which is currently based on 1.20.2 via the Fabric Loader.

We recommend setting at least 4096MB (4GB) of Memory to be available to JVM. This can be done by right-clicking "Enhanced Wynncraft" once installed and clicking "View Instance". Once under the instance, select "Options" and Enable "Override Global Memory Settings". Finally, add in at least 4096 MB. We recommend 6144 (6GB) for a smoother experience if available.

When updating to 1.20.2 from 1.19.4, please execute "/bobby upgrade" to update the chunk caching.

Please join the Discord Server for further support if needed. Provided by the Ordo Spiritus Draconis Wynncraft Guild.

Credits to the Mod Authors Listed from Modrinth. Without their mods, this pack just simply wouldn't be possible. This project is not associated with Wynncraft MMORPG or Wynntils and is a fan creation dedicated to providing the best experience for players.
